name: LIQUIDITY SERVICES INC
business: Liquidity Services is the leading global provider of e-commerce marketplaces and software solutions powering the circular economy. It connects millions of buyers and thousands of sellers through its auction marketplaces, search engines, asset management and auction software, and related services, enabling the transparent, efficient, sustainable recovery of value from excess items owned by business and government sellers.

exposures.sentence: Liquidity Services is the leading global provider of e-commerce marketplaces and software solutions powering the circular economy.
We are required to maintain the privacy and security of personal and business information amidst multiplying threat landscapes and in compliance with privacy and data protection regulations globally.
